title: Domain 1: Design Secure Architectures (30%)
description: Secure access with IAM, protect data with encryption and key management, and secure networks with VPC controls. The heaviest domain on the exam.

lessons.title: Identity and Access: IAM
objectives: Explain IAM users, groups, roles, and policies
Choose roles over long-lived keys for workloads and cross-account access
Apply least privilege and predict how allow and deny evaluate

lessons.title: Data Protection: Encryption and KMS
objectives: Encrypt data both at rest and in transit
Explain what KMS does and when to use customer managed keys
Use ACM and Secrets Manager instead of hard-coded secrets

lessons.title: Network Security: VPC, Security Groups, and NACLs
objectives: Lay out public and private subnets with internet and NAT gateways
Contrast stateful security groups with stateless network ACLs
Use VPC endpoints and edge protections (WAF, Shield)
